The '''''Subjugator''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] that was part of [[Task Force Vengeance]]. She was part of the group of reinforcements that were pulled out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Modified Strike Cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Dreadnaught-class)|Peregrine]] and was [[Ambush in the Derilyn system|destroyed]] along with the rest of the group by the Rebels.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
